name: Nicca Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nicca Chemical Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells surfactants for textile chemicals, metals, pulp and paper, paints, dyes, synthetic resins, and dry cleaning and professional cleaning agents in Japan and internationally. The company offers textile chemicals, including oiling, scouring, chelating and dispersing, penetrant and antifoam, carrier, leveling, oligomer control, improving color fastness to rubbing and light, printing, antistatic, soil-release finishing, flame retarding, napping, and life care agents, as well as bleaching stabilizer, in-bath quality improver, machine cleaner, water and oil repellent, softener, and stiffener. It also provides specialty chemicals comprising metal processing chemicals, such as spray cleaner, and cleaning agents for various application; paper and pulp chemicals, including delinking and dryer release softener, felt cleaner, flameproof, and defoamer; color developer for thermal paper; and nonionic, anionic, cationic and amphoteric surfactants. In addition, the company offers advanced materials comprising functional artificial nucleic acid, carbon fiber composite material, femto reactor, and nanodiamond applied products. Further, it provides cleaning chemicals for laundry, wet system, and dry cleaning; and agents for linen supply and dust control, and facilities. Additionally, the company designs, develops, manufactures, and sells hair beauty products for the professional salon industry; and pharmaceutical products. Nicca Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Fukui, Japan.
